ActionCard.DropItemHere: Drop an item here to embed it
ActionCard.StatusHint: Status effects to apply when chain conditions are met
ActionCard.SavedDescriptionHint: Description for the saved damage application
ActionCard.DropActionItemHere: Drop a combat power, gear, or feature here to embed it.
ActionCard.DropEffectHere: Drop status effects or gear here to add them.
ActionCard.EffectNotes: Effects can be applied when attack chain conditions are met.
ActionCard.DragToExtract: Drag to extract this item as a new item
ActionCard.DragNote: Tip: Drag items to actors, compendiums, or item tabs to create copies.
ActionCard.ActionItemDescription: Used as the primary action trigger for this action card
ActionCard.EffectsDescription: Applied to targets when action card conditions are met

AdvanceInitiative.label: Advance Initiative
AdvanceInitiative.hint: When enabled, advances initiative after execution. Can only be used on your turn.

ActionCard.AdvanceInitiativeTurnError: You can only use this action card on your turn when 'Advance Initiative' is enabled.

AttemptInventoryReduction.label: Attempt Effect Inventory Reduction
AttemptInventoryReduction.hint: When enabled, attempts to reduce your inventory when applying gear effects. If disabled, gear effects will be applied without checking inventory.

ActionCard.GearEffectInventoryWarning: You don't have enough {gearName} in your inventory to apply this effect.
ActionCard.GearEffectNotFoundWarning: You don't have {gearName} in your inventory to apply this effect.
ActionCard.GearEffectInsufficientWarning: You don't have enough {gearName} in your inventory to apply this effect (need {required}, have {available}).

EnforceStatusChoice.label: Enforce Status Choice
EnforceStatusChoice.hint: When enabled, prevents rolling this action card if more than one status effect is selected. Users must select zero or one status effects.

SelfTarget.label: Self-Target
SelfTarget.hint: When enabled, this action card automatically targets your own actor instead of requiring target selection. Useful for self-buffs and self-healing effects.

InsufficientPower.Title: Insufficient Power
InsufficientPower.Message: Cannot execute {itemName} - requires {required} power but only {available} available

InsufficientQuantity.Title: Insufficient Quantity
InsufficientQuantity.Message: Cannot execute {itemName} - requires {required} quantity but only {available} available

GearNotFound.Title: Gear Not Found
GearNotFound.Message: Cannot execute {itemName} - gear item not found in actor's inventory

ActionCard.RepetitionCountAdjusted: Repetition formula resulted in {originalCount}, adjusted to minimum of 1

Config.IntensifyBehaviorHint: Configure how much each effect type intensifies when a status is reapplied to an existing target. Set to 0 to prevent intensification for that effect type. Only applies in Attack Chain mode.

ActionCard.SelfEffectsConditionHint: When should self-effects be applied to the card owner?
ActionCard.SelfEffectsThresholdHint: The roll value required to trigger self-effects (for rollValue condition)
ActionCard.SelfEffectsApplicationLimitHelp: Maximum number of times self-effects can be applied per action card execution (0 = unlimited)
ActionCard.SelfEffectsApplicationLimitHint: Maximum number of times self-effects can be applied (0 = unlimited)
ActionCard.SelfEffectsNotes: Self-effects can be applied to the card owner based on success conditions. Effects can include status, gear, or features.
ActionCard.RollValueHint: Activate when roll total is at or above threshold value
ActionCard.RollUnderValueHint: Activate when roll total is below threshold value
ActionCard.RollEvenHint: Activate when roll total is an even number
ActionCard.RollOddHint: Activate when roll total is an odd number
ActionCard.RollOnValueHint: Activate only when roll equals exact threshold value (rare condition)
ActionCard.ZeroSuccessesHint: Activate only when both AC checks fail
ActionCard.CriticalSuccessHint: Activate on a critical hit (based on die result, not total)
ActionCard.CriticalFailureHint: Activate on a critical miss (based on die result, not total)
